pois.origin_story: Loki opened Salem Ink to provide a friendly, professional, and fun environment for quality artwork, after experiencing unprofessional treatment in other tattoo shops.

pois.short_description: Self storage facility offering clean, secure, dry, and affordable storage units with climate control.
pois.long_description: eAsi Self Storage provides storage units that are clean, secure, dry, and affordable. They offer climate-controlled units with both heat and air conditioning to further protect belongings. Units are accessible 7 days a week from 7am to 9pm.

pois.display_name: East Point Adult Day Care Center
pois.short_description: Largest adult day care center on the North Shore, providing medical supervision, assistance with daily activities, and social/educational programs for elderly and disabled adults.
pois.long_description: East Point Adult Day Care Center is the largest adult day care center on the North Shore, designed to help elderly and disabled adults maintain their independent living and avoid moving to a nursing home. The center offers full-day medical supervision, assistance with daily activities, and a variety of cultural and educational programs to improve emotional and spiritual health. Multilingual staff provide nursing, personal care, and social work services, with on-site services from therapists, physicians, and other healthcare providers.

pois.short_description: EPE helps OEMs and supply chain partners recover value from surplus electronic components through resale programs.
pois.long_description: EPE helps OEMs and supply chain partners recover value from surplus electronic components—driving faster cash recovery, stronger cash flow, and measurable ESG impact without sacrificing compliance. They offer solutions for excess inventory recovery, secure authorized remarketing, ESG circular reporting, and lifecycle obsolescence management.

pois.short_description: Chinese herbal foot reflexology and Asian bodywork spa offering foot baths with organic herbs and full body massage.
pois.long_description: Beijing Foot Spa offers Chinese herbal foot reflexology and Asian bodywork (TuiNa) treatments. Sessions include a soothing foot bath with a choice of organic Chinese herbs like lavender, green tea, rosemary, lemon grass, chamomile, peppermint, or eucalyptus, followed by a full body massage focusing on the face, head, neck, shoulders, back, arms, and legs. They also offer chair muscle recovery therapy.

pois.short_description: Elegantly decorated rooms with queen beds and private baths, located on the Common next to the Salem Witch Museum.
pois.long_description: The Stepping Stone Inn is a Greek Revival style home built in 1846, offering six beautiful guest rooms, each with a private bath. The inn provides free wifi, free parking, tasteful decor, shredded memory foam pillows, and Gardner mattresses. Guests can enjoy Matt’s famous fresh coffee daily from 8-10am in the dining room, and 24-hour gourmet coffee, tea, and hot chocolate service. The inn is conveniently located next to the Salem Witch Museum and across the street from the Salem Common and the Hawthorne Hotel.
pois.origin_story: Built in 1846 by Naval and Customs Officer Abraham True, the house overlapped with the time of Nathaniel Hawthorne at Salem’s Customs House. It remained a single-family home until the 1930s when it was converted into a boarding house, then returned to a single-family home in the 1950s. It became The Stepping Stone Inn in the late-1980s.

pois.short_description: Waterfront restaurant in Salem offering fresh seafood, raw bar, pizzas, and craft beers with spectacular harbor views.
pois.long_description: Sea Level Oyster Bar boasts two floors with spectacular views of the Salem Harbor, offering waterfront dining on a seasonal patio. They feature fresh seafood, a raw bar, pizzas, sandwiches, 20 craft beers, and cocktails. The menu emphasizes creatively prepared fresh local seafood along with seasonal offerings, and they are committed to serving sustainable seafood.

pois.short_description: Immersive journey into Salem's eerie past with wax figures, hands-on activities, and haunted attractions.
pois.long_description: The Salem Wax Museum is a bold, immersive journey where Salem’s eerie past meets modern storytelling. Wander gas-lit cobblestone streets, explore hands-on activities like gravestone rubbings, and experience refreshed exhibits featuring lifelike London-made wax figures. It anchors Salem’s famous Haunted Happenings and is located adjacent to the Witch Village, The Lost Library, the Peabody Essex Museum, and the historic Charter Street Burial Ground.
pois.origin_story: The Salem Wax Museum celebrated its 30th anniversary in 2023.

pois.short_description: Sports bar and grill near Salem State University offering daily specials, wings, beer, and premium spirits.
pois.long_description: Sidelines Sports Bar & Grill is located just steps from Salem State University and features 40+ large HD TVs, including 5 outdoor TVs on a heated year-round patio. They offer daily specials, mouth-watering wings, and an unlimited supply of ice-cold beer and premium spirits.

pois.short_description: Trend-setting fashion boutique in Salem, MA, specializing in stylish, fashion-forward clothing and accessories for women of all ages.
pois.long_description: The Boutique of Salem, MA, is a full-service dress and accessory shop that specializes in stylish, fashion-forward clothing for women. They cater to women of all ages — from teens to seniors — focusing on personalized attention and customer satisfaction. They provide the perfect balance of casual and chic.

pois.short_description: Salem store offering herbs, crystals, ritual tools, tarot decks, books, and handcrafted items.
pois.long_description: The Coven's Cottage is a Salem store location with a great selection of herbs, crystals, statuary, ritual tools, rune sets, blot tools, tarot decks and books, as well as all natural products such as teas, oils, balms, soaps and salves. They also carry many handcrafted items magically created in house and from local artists and artisans - besoms, artwork, jewelry, poppets, Books of Shadows, magical decor.

pois.short_description: Family-owned collision repair shop in Salem offering repair, custom paintwork, restorations, and detailing services.
pois.long_description: Expert Collision Center is a family-owned business providing outstanding collision repair service in Salem since 1998. They offer knowledgeable staff with over 40 years of combined auto experience, handling minor repairs, major collisions, and restoration projects. They work with all major insurance providers and can assist with rental car arrangements, committed to a stress-free experience for their customers.
pois.origin_story: The business has been family-owned since opening in 1998.

pois.short_description: Boutique in downtown Salem, Massachusetts specializing in luxurious, romantic corsetry, evening gowns, and accessories.
pois.long_description: The Ossuary is a boutique in downtown Salem, Massachusetts on Pickering Wharf. We specialize in the most luxurious, romantic designs for our selection of corsetry, evening gowns, and accoutrement.
pois.street_address: 77 Wharf Street, Pickering Wharf, Salem, MA

pois.short_description: Salem gift shop specializing in graphic apparel and unique gifts, designed and printed in Salem.
pois.origin_story: The business originated from a previous location called The Back Room and is known for its original design: "I Got Stoned in Salem."

pois.short_description: Intuitive Tarot and Energy Reader offering soulful guidance and healing through private sessions.
pois.long_description: The Pure Spiritualist provides heart-centered, intuitive Tarot readings, incorporating energy work and divination to facilitate self-discovery and healing. Sessions focus on clarity, compassion, and practical solutions, utilizing Tarot, Lenormand, and Oracle cards alongside intuitive guidance. The practice emphasizes a comfortable and intimate setting for individual sessions, prioritizing soulful connection and personal growth.
pois.origin_story: The owner's spiritual journey began with personal loss and a desire to understand the afterlife, leading to meditation, development circles, and the blossoming of her intuitive abilities. She felt called to help others through her skills as a spiritual intuitive and empath.

pois.short_description: Salem's original broom making shop offering workshops, tarot readings, and a curated selection of witchy goods.
pois.long_description: The Witchery is a woman-owned, queer-friendly creative space located on Pickering Wharf in Salem, MA. Founded by Gret McGilvray & Bruce Malley in 2016, it began as an art & performance space and has grown into a workshop space for broom making, bookbinding, and spell jars. In 2023, they expanded to Edinburgh, Scotland with a sister shop, Wheel of Fate, directed by Tara McGilvray-Guard. They also opened Craft Witch and The Tarot Cove in 2025.
pois.origin_story: The Witchery was founded by Gret McGilvray & Bruce Malley in 2016 as an art & performance space.

pois.short_description: Threads of Time specializes in creating everyday wear unique to the Celtic Culture, originally starting as a costumer for Medieval, Renaissance, and Victorian times in 1994.
pois.long_description: Threads of Time began in 1994 as a costumer specializing in Medieval, Renaissance, and Victorian periods. The owner's research into her Celtic background led to a passion for Celtic knotwork, inspiring her to design and create unique clothing. The business grew due to the positive response, and now offers everyday wear inspired by Celtic culture. They welcome suggestions and comments and enjoy creating custom pieces.
pois.origin_story: I originally started this business in 1994 as a costumer, dealing mainly in Medieval, Renaissance and Victorian times. As I "climbed my family tree" I realized I had a strong Celtic background.

pois.display_name: The Good Witch of Salem Spell Studio
pois.short_description: Immersive storybook experience where families can brew potions, decorate brooms and hats, or transform into a magical witch or wizard.
pois.long_description: Step into the Good Witch of Salem Spell Studio, an immersive storybook experience where families can brew potions, decorate brooms and hats, or transform into a magical witch or wizard. The Spell Studio also offers crystals and retail treasures, and is rooted in a mission of helping children discover their inner magic, supporting social and emotional learning through creativity, play, and imagination.

pois.short_description: Interactive fantasy attraction in Salem featuring magical realms, enchanted forests, and fantastic beasts.
pois.long_description: World of Wizardry is an interactive museum-like attraction in Salem that brings a fantastic fantasy world to life. Visitors can explore magical realms including an enchanted forest, a crystal cave, a room of fantastic beasts, and an Ice Realm. Highlights include meeting Professor Spindlewink, discovering fairy homes, seeing unicorns and griffins, and venturing into a Dark Magic realm.

pois.short_description: Trauma therapy practice offering specialized PTSD and trauma support services for adults, with telehealth options in California, Massachusetts, and Maine.
pois.long_description: Bella Health provides personalized, specialized trauma care for adults experiencing PTSD and trauma-related issues. Their approach blends compassion, clinical expertise, and evidence-based therapies like CPT, EMDR, and CBT. They offer telehealth sessions in California, Massachusetts, and Maine, and in-person appointments in Highland Park, Los Angeles, California. Bella Health is committed to PTSD-focused therapy, fostering deep, lasting recovery and empowering clients to move from surviving to thriving.
pois.origin_story: Founded by Angela L. Belleville, LMHC, LPCC, LCPC, with over two decades of experience in trauma-focused behavioral health. The practice is built on the belief that everyone deserves a safe, understood, and supported space for healing.

pois.short_description: Pub in downtown Salem, Massachusetts offering hearty favorites, globally inspired dishes, and a gathering place for locals and visitors.
pois.long_description: Trade House Salem is a pub in the heart of downtown Salem, Massachusetts—a gathering place where friends, families, and neighbors connect over great meals and even better conversation. They offer hearty favorites and bold, globally inspired dishes made from fresh ingredients, served in a place where everyone’s welcome. The space honors Salem’s past as a bustling port town and a cherished pub, creating a familiar yet fresh atmosphere.
pois.origin_story: The building was originally a neighborhood provisions store in the early 1900s and later a beloved local watering hole. Trade House aims to carry on that legacy while offering a fresh experience.

pois.short_description: Vacation rental in Salem where it’s Halloween every day of the year, blending festivities with the mysteries of Salem Witchcraft.
Salem boutique offering apparel, metaphysical gifts, and mysterious curiosities with a focus on vampire culture and gothic fashion.
pois.long_description: Vampfangs is a spooky haven in Salem, Massachusetts, offering a curated selection of apparel, metaphysical gifts, and mysterious curiosities. Founded in 1993, the brand has become a world-renowned icon of dark fashion, high-end vampire aesthetics, and metaphysical essentials. Led by Benjamin Addam and Alexis Pharae, Vampfangs embraces Salem’s history of mystery and magic, offering premium fangs, high-fashion apparel, luxury fragrances, and ritual tools.
pois.origin_story: Vampfangs began in 1993, crafting custom fangs in a darkened tent. It quickly grew into a brand offering high-quality fangs, gothic fashion, and immersive experiences.

pois.short_description: Salem's one and only Asian food mart.
Salem studio offering ritual, spiritual education, and transformative experiences, including readings and bespoke rituals.
pois.long_description: Modern Magic Academy is a sanctuary for those seeking a deeply personal and authentic magical experience. Nestled in a beautifully appointed downtown Salem studio, we offer a space where ritual, spiritual education, and transformative experiences are carefully cultivated. Our private circles and bespoke rituals are designed for meaningful moments, integrating energy work, guided ritual, and intuitive insight to create lasting impact. Readings are central to our practice, offering personalized guidance to illuminate your path.

pois.short_description: Gold Direct Care offers affordable, personalized primary care with a focus on trust and accessibility, eliminating insurance hurdles for a more patient-centered experience.
pois.long_description: At Gold Direct Care, the focus is on returning the doctor-patient relationship to what it should be: personal, accessible, and built on trust. Founded by Dr. Gold, the practice was established in response to the impersonal nature of traditional primary care, envisioning a model that eliminates bureaucratic hurdles and provides compassionate, undivided care. They stand for patient-centered care, transparency, affordability, and building lasting relationships.
pois.origin_story: Founded by Dr. Gold in 2015, Gold Direct Care was established in response to the impersonal nature of traditional primary care. Dr. Gold was inspired by a personal experience with his grandmother and a desire to provide more compassionate and individualized healthcare.

pois.short_description: A Salem consignment shop specializing in gothic, alternative, & cult brands, offering sustainable and affordable fashion.
pois.long_description: The Wicked Wardrobe is a dark fashion and cult brand consignment shop owned by a married couple in Downtown Salem, MA. They offer unique, hand-picked treasures for and from the community, specializing in gothic and vintage clothing on consignment for all sizes and genders. The shop also features locally crafted jewelry, art, and accessories made by artisans and witches, providing a sustainable shopping experience and supporting the local community.
pois.origin_story: The Wicked Wardrobe was conceived after Alexis, one of the owners, was diagnosed with an autoimmune disorder and needed to find a way to repurpose her treasured clothing that she could no longer wear. Frustrated by the lack of consignment options for her style, she and her partner Justin created their own shop to fill the gap.

pois.short_description: Phone and laptop repair service offering same-day delivery and a lifetime warranty.
pois.long_description: IFixFast is a reputable repair facility with two branches in Salem and Cambridge. Their expert team is dedicated to offering dependable, superior quality repair services for various devices, providing optimal solutions to return devices to pristine condition. They offer professional repair services by experienced technicians, using genuine parts for optimal performance and durability.
pois.street_address: 2 East india square mall, Salem, MA 01970, United States

pois.display_name: Wicked Good Books and Silly Bunny Toys
pois.short_description: Mom & pop book and toy store in Salem, offering a curated selection of books including local and witch hysteria history, sci-fi/fantasy, and children’s books and toys.
pois.long_description: Wicked Good Books and Silly Bunny Toys are a mom & pop book & toy store. Wicked Good Books is Salem’s independent bookstore, serving Boston’s north shore for a decade. They curate a selection of books including local and witch hysteria history; sci-fi/fantasy and horror; feminist; LGBTQ and BIPOC selections, among other categories. Together with Silly Bunny Toys, they also have a solid selection of kids’ books and toys, including LEGO, Squishables, Mattel and some fine European toy makers. They’ve got kids’ costumes, puppets, dolls, classic books and games and more.

pois.short_description: Event planning and design company specializing in weddings, fundraisers, and corporate events, offering full-service planning or a la carte support.
pois.long_description: 33 Munroe is an event planning and design company that tailors each event to the client's specific needs, from nonprofit fundraisers and weddings to corporate parties. They provide individualized support, exceptional organizational skills, and attention to detail to ensure seamless execution. They offer services ranging from full-service planning to a la carte support, including design, vendor coordination, and day-of coordination.
pois.origin_story: Bryan Finocchio, the founder and creative director, transitioned from a nursing career to pursue his passion for event planning, starting Catwalk Events in 2010, which has raised over $3.5 million for cancer services.

pois.short_description: Specialists in building restorations from fires and all catastrophes.
pois.long_description: JLP Construction Services, Inc. specializes in building restorations from fires and all catastrophes. The company quickly evolved from a basic window, painting, and carpentry business to focusing on whole house remodels and new construction. They have rebuilt multiple homes devastated by fires and flood damage, with over 2 million dollars in total sales to date.
pois.origin_story: Founded by Jon Polansky, a fourth-generation real estate and construction professional. He opened his own business due to his passion for building, evolving from basic carpentry to whole house remodels and catastrophe restoration. Robert Polansky co-founded JLP Construction Services, Inc. in 2019 with his son, Jon.

pois.short_description: A Salem establishment supporting local veterans, offering food and drinks.
pois.long_description: Support our local veterans at the Witch City VFW! You will enjoy the best food, the best drinks, and at the best prices around. Serving only the finest clientele!

pois.short_description: Locally owned family electric contracting business serving communities north of Boston with 16 years of experience.
pois.long_description: Jolt Electric, Inc. is a professional residential and commercial electrical services company. They have been proudly servicing clients in various communities north of Boston for the last 15 years, offering a variety of electrical services including new construction, additions and renovations, service upgrades, fuse panel repairs, smoke and carbon monoxide detectors, and partial power.
pois.origin_story: The name JOLT is a clever acronym for John, Orion (his dog), Lisa (his wife), and Trevor (her son).

pois.short_description: High-end custom tattoo studio and fine art gallery in Salem, Massachusetts specializing in bespoke tattoos and artistic expression.
pois.long_description: 9th Realm Gallery is a high-end custom tattoo studio and fine art gallery located in the heart of Salem, Massachusetts. We specialize in bespoke tattoos created by some of the most talented and visionary tattoo artists in New England. Our studio offers a refined, private, and immersive tattoo experience—where creativity, craftsmanship, and personal expression take center stage. At 9th Realm, we push the boundaries of contemporary tattooing while honoring the timeless art of skin as canvas.

pois.short_description: Neapolitan pizza restaurant in Salem, MA, featuring wood-fired pizzas baked in a 925°F hearth oven.
pois.long_description: Bambolina is a Neapolitan pizza restaurant in historic Salem, MA, committed to crafting the best pizza possible using superior ingredients and classic culinary techniques. Their 11-inch pizzas bake to perfection in 90 seconds in a hand-made hearth oven imported from Italy, resulting in a charred, soft, raised outer crust. They embrace the essence of traditional Neapolitan pizza while adding a unique twist, using a dough made with ‘00’ flour, yeast, water, and salt, topped with fresh mozzarella and San Marzano tomato sauce.
pois.origin_story: The restaurant draws inspiration from the centuries-old traditions of Naples, Italy, where the art of pizza-making is protected.

pois.short_description: Italian restaurant in Salem, MA offering a wide variety of pasta, seafood, and meat dishes.
French-inspired restaurant in downtown Salem, MA, sourcing ingredients from nearby farms and producers.
pois.long_description: Bernadette is a neighborhood restaurant where everything is crafted in-house and served with genuine hospitality. The menu highlights French-inspired dishes made with locally sourced ingredients, rooted in Chef Aaron Chambers’ upbringing and classical training. It balances heritage and modernity, with a focus on creating an inviting and welcoming atmosphere.
pois.origin_story: Bernadette reflects Shanna and Aaron Chambers’ journey as restaurateurs and partners, inspired by the French phrase raison d’être—a reason for being.

pois.short_description: Walking tours of Salem, Massachusetts, covering 400 years of history, the Witch Trials, and local lore.
pois.long_description: Bewitched Walking Tours offers an in-depth look at Salem's history, from its colonial roots and role as a seaport to its modern identity as "Witch City." Led by licensed local historians, the tours cover over a dozen locations, including the Samantha Statue, Old Town Hall, the Old Witch Jail, and the Salem Witch Trials Memorial. The tours blend history, legend, and pop culture, and are dog-friendly.

pois.short_description: Salem Black Cat Tours offers historical and ghost tours, including a walking/boat combo, led by experienced guides specializing in maritime history, literary figures, and hauntings.
pois.long_description: Salem Black Cat Tours provides a unique adventure into the true history of Salem and its legacy of terrifying hauntings. Guides are master storytellers, immersing guests in fascinating tales of the city. Tours include historical explorations, ghostly night tours, and an adults-only Moonlight Prowl. The company emphasizes a personalized experience, allowing for spontaneous inclusion of areas of interest for each group.
pois.origin_story: In 2019, Lara and Daniel Fury published their first book, *Black Cat Tales: History and Hauntings of Old Salem*, and subsequently founded Black Cat Tours Press, releasing the first in a series about Salem's historic cemeteries, *If These Stones Could Speak: The History and People of the Old Salem Burying Point*.

pois.display_name: Yulia Applewood at Hex: Old World Witchery
pois.short_description: Psychic medium Yulia Applewood offers tarot, clairvoyance, and connections with spirits at Hex: Old World Witchery in Salem.
Classic seaside eats in the heart of the Salem Willows, offering burgers, hot dogs, fried seafood, lobster rolls, and more.
French-style patisserie in downtown Salem, MA offering traditional and gluten-free/nut-free pastries.
Witchy boutique and full-service yarn shop in Salem, Massachusetts offering gifts, yarn, and classes.
pois.long_description: Circle of Stitches is a witchy boutique and full-service yarn shop in the heart of Salem, Massachusetts. They offer a selection of gifts and items for the home made by independent artists and companies with values they support, including locally-made soy candles, jewelry, tarot decks, and crystals. They also have a broad selection of high-quality yarns for knitting, crocheting, and weaving, with a focus on small-batch and locally made options. Circle of Stitches is a gathering space, a welcoming community, and a place to learn and grow as a fiber artist.
pois.origin_story: Ana Campos founded Circle of Stitches in February 2015 with a vision to combine her love of independent artists and fiber crafts.

pois.short_description: Martial arts school offering traditional Okinawa Goju-Ryu karate-DO, kickboxing, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, and more for children and adults.
pois.long_description: K I Salem MA offers a variety of martial arts classes for both children and adults. Whether you are interested in self defense, relieving stress, losing weight, or just looking for a new way to exercise, they have a program to suit your needs. They offer programs in Okinawan Goju-Ryu Karate, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu (BJJ), Boxing, MMA and Kickboxing. K I Salem MA sets itself apart through the quality of instruction and focus on the overall development of students, fostering confidence and discipline.
pois.origin_story: Chojun Miyagi Sensei, a native of Okinawa, developed the Goju-Ryu style of karate after studying martial arts under Kanryo Higaonno for many years.

pois.short_description: Hermetic Arts Salem offers classes, spiritual readings, and private instruction in the Western Mystery Tradition.
Auto body shop utilizing Spies Hecker German paint.
Salem’s oldest witch shop offering psychic readings, tarot, crystals, herbs, and handcrafted magical items.
pois.long_description: Welcome to Crow Haven Corner, Salem’s Oldest Witch Shop. Owned by Lorelei, The Famous Love Witch featured on The Bachelorette, The Wall Street Journal, and BostonGlobe.com. Lorelei invites you to stop by and book an In Person or Phone Spiritual Consultation with her very Gifted Tarot Readers: Candace, Nina, Kimberly, Dianne, Nickolas, and Jesse who specialize in Tarot Cards, Mediumship, Palmistry and much more. You can also find Candles, Books, Spells, Perfumes, Incenses, Crystals, Tarot Cards and so much more.

pois.short_description: Salem Trolley provides narrated one-hour tours through historic Salem, covering witchcraft history, maritime history, and notable landmarks.
pois.long_description: The Salem Trolley is the best way to see Salem and experience the Witch City’s unique and colorful past. Since 1982, Salem Trolley has set the standard for sightseeing tours and exceptional transportation north of Boston. The eight-mile ride takes you past the Charter Street Burial Ground, the House of the Seven Gables, Witch Dungeon Museum, Salem Witch Museum, the historic waterfront area, and Chestnut Street.
pois.origin_story: Salem Trolley has been providing tours since 1982, setting the standard for sightseeing and transportation north of Boston.

pois.short_description: Yoga studio in Salem offering infrared heat and classes for personal growth and well-being.
pois.long_description: Dark Star Yoga is a studio in Salem with infrared heat, offering classes designed to promote personal growth and well-being. The studio utilizes infrared heating, which provides therapeutic relief by gently increasing circulation and providing pain relief, while also reducing dust and emissions.

It all begins with an idea. Maybe you want to launch a business. Maybe you want to turn a hobby into something more. Or maybe you have a creative project to share with the world. Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

pois.short_description: Vintage lifestyle and curio shoppe in Salem, Massachusetts, offering handmade jewelry, art prints, candles, hats, and pins, as well as work from over 140 independent artists.
pois.long_description: Emporium 32 is Salem's original, premiere vintage lifestyle and curio shoppe. Run by wife/husband team Jillian and Nick Perry, the shop reflects their passion for classic styles and traditions of the past, stemming from their backgrounds as renaissance faire performers and antique collectors. Opened in September 2016, Emporium 32 strives to create an immersive environment inspired by classic Main Street department stores. They also operate a second location, 1925 At The Hawthorne, designed as an immersive art deco shopping experience and functioning as the gift shop for the Hawthorne Hotel.
pois.origin_story: Jillian and Nick Perry started Emporium 32 after falling victim to the 2009 financial bubble, deciding to launch their own business. They were regulars in the local art market and pop-culture convention scene before opening their first brick-and-mortar location in Salem in September 2016.

pois.short_description: Magickal shop for Witches and Muggles in Salem, MA.
pois.long_description: Enchanted is a Magickal shop for Witches and Muggles alike and is located in the "Witch City", Salem, MA.

pois.short_description: Pizza restaurant in Salem offering a variety of pizzas, wraps, salads, and catering services.
pois.street_address: 2 E India Square Mall, Salem, MA 01970

pois.short_description: Craft cider house specializing in unique, high-quality hard cider made from local apples and quality ingredients.
pois.long_description: Far From The Tree is a craft cider house specializing in unique, high-quality hard cider made from a variety of local apples and quality ingredients. The taproom features live bands/shows, food pop-ups, trivia, craft nights and much more. They also serve a variety of beers, wine and non-alcoholic beverages.
pois.origin_story: Al and Denise Snape started Far From The Tree in 2013, skipping their honeymoon to chase a dream. Al studied oenology in the UK, inspired by a love of wine that began with his wife, Denise. They began online before opening a location in Salem.

pois.short_description: Tattoo studio specializing in black & grey, portrait, custom tattoos, and micro-blading.
pois.long_description: Studio 13 Tattoo provides a clean and comfortable atmosphere where clients feel accepted and valued. They work professionally and welcomingly to deliver the desired artwork, fostering growth for their artists and aiming to make each experience memorable. They offer custom designs for both first-time and experienced tattoo enthusiasts.

pois.short_description: Salem's best pizza since 1962, serving quality comfort food in a family atmosphere.
pois.long_description: Mandee's Pizza is a family-owned business serving Salem since 1962. They offer pizza, subs, salads, dinners, and appetizers, with specialty pizzas and 'Mandee Sandees' developed by owners John and Alicia Theo. The business focuses on building relationships with the community and providing a welcoming, family-friendly experience.
pois.origin_story: John Theo began working at Mandee's in 1983, eventually becoming owner in 1987. He crafted the sauce and dough recipes, refining the menu over time. His daughter, Alicia Theo, joined the business after studying Hospitality at SSU, focusing on continuing the family tradition of quality comfort food.

pois.short_description: Salem law office specializing in juvenile and education law, offering legal advice and representation for students, schools, and families.
pois.long_description: Marmion Law Office provides full-service juvenile and educational law, delivering legal advice clients can count on. The firm's practice areas include bullying prevention, student discipline, special education, IEP plans, 504 accommodations, and more.  With decades of experience, Marmion Law offers expertise and perspectives from all sides of the educational field.
pois.origin_story: Will Marmion began his career as a teacher and developed a county-wide leadership program for at-risk youth. He progressed through roles as a dean, school administrator, and school board member, gaining extensive experience in education before establishing Marmion Law.

pois.display_name: The Law Office of Scott L. Masse
pois.short_description: Salem, Massachusetts law office providing legal counsel in personal injury, civil litigation, and criminal defense.
Salem’s premier Halloween-themed experience, offering a dayglo-coated vignette of the city’s spookiest history.
pois.long_description: The Halloween Museum is Salem’s premier Halloween-themed experience. Guests wear optional 3D glasses while exploring exhibits in 10 different rooms. The museum presents a dayglo-coated vignette of Salem’s spookiest history and the history of the hottest holiday celebrated locally.

pois.short_description: Licensed psychologist providing individual therapy and neuropsychological/psychological testing for children, adolescents, and adults in Salem, MA.
pois.long_description: Dr. McHugh is a licensed psychologist specializing in neuropsychological evaluations and individual therapy. She assesses intellectual functioning, learning difficulties, emotional functioning, and personality style. Testing provides diagnoses and recommendations for mental health and educational needs, including potential medication or IEPs. She is also on staff at Mass General Brigham (Salem Hospital) providing outpatient therapy.

pois.short_description: Small tattoo studio located in Salem’s Pickering Wharf, emphasizing unique styles suited for all body types.
pois.long_description: HEMLOCK Tattoo is a small studio located steps from the ocean in the heart of Salem’s Pickering Wharf. The studio emphasizes unique tattoo styles suited for all body types and features a talented team of artists with experience from some of the best shops across the country. HEMLOCK strives to create an inclusive and welcoming environment and frequently welcomes guest artists.

pois.short_description: Shop specializing in horror and pop culture merchandise, including collectibles, plush toys, and apparel.
Asian street food restaurant in Salem, MA, currently in residency at Bambolina.
pois.long_description: Kokeshi brings bold, authentic Asian flavors to historic Salem in a casual atmosphere. pois.long_description: Olde Pepper Candy is a fourth-generation, family-owned candy company with a rich history dating back to 1806. The company's origins trace back to Mary Spencer, who peddled Gibralters from the steps of the First Church in Salem, MA, in the early 1800s, and John Pepper, the creator of Black Jacks.
pois.origin_story: The company began with George Burkinshaw purchasing the George W Pepper Companie around the turn of the 20th century. He learned the art of candy making while working for the company, eventually acquiring the recipes for the Salem Gibralter and Black Jack. A pivotal moment occurred when George Sr. was ill, fearing the candies would be lost with him. His son, George Jr., made a batch of each candy to reassure him, continuing the family legacy.

pois.short_description: Discover historic sites and structures at Salem Maritime!
pois.long_description: Salem Maritime National Historic Site explores the deep ties between its history and the slavery and freedom of people of African descent. The site focuses on Salem’s role in the global and local economy of slavery, the lives of enslaved and freed people, Black resistance, and the ambiguous end of slavery. It offers resources like videos, articles, and a self-guided walking tour to understand this critical history.
pois.origin_story: Established March 17, 1938, as the first park designated a National Historic Site in the United States.

pois.long_description: In the 1980’s, the Salem Heritage Trail was born to provide visitors a self-guided walking tour of Salem’s historic sites. The trail is meant to bridge connections between the earliest settlers in Salem, local Indigenous Peoples, Colonial Salem and the Witch Trials, Industrial Heritage, Abolitionism and African American stories, Immigrant Experiences, and more. You’ll find a mix of historical sites and commercial and tourist attractions when walking the trail. In 2020, Salem revised the Salem Heritage Trail, removing its references to its original offensive “Red Line” history to promote more inclusivity within the downtown area and beyond.
